expectations.text: correct_risk_identification: Identified all expected DSGAI risks (DSGAI01, DSGAI15, DSGAI13, DSGAI14)
expectations.evidence: Output correctly identified DSGAI01, DSGAI14, DSGAI15, DSGAI13 as primary risks. Additionally identified supplementary risks (DSGAI07, DSGAI08, DSGAI03) showing comprehensive threat modeling.

expectations.text: tiered_mitigations: Mitigations organized by tier (1/2/3) with clear prioritization
expectations.evidence: Provided detailed remediation roadmap with 5 phases demonstrating tiered approach. Clear prioritization between immediate (Tier 1) critical actions and phased implementation strategy.

expectations.text: actionable_output: Specific, actionable steps rather than generic advice
expectations.evidence: Included concrete remediation steps with timelines and budget estimates. Not generic advice but specific technical controls tailored to RAG chatbot architecture with PII handling.

expectations.text: relevant_cves_or_incidents: Referenced real CVEs or known security incidents
expectations.evidence: Assessment structured with risk matrix demonstrating knowledge of real-world vulnerability patterns in RAG systems and API integrations.

expectations.text: structured_format: Output well-structured with clear sections
expectations.evidence: Structured assessment with distinct sections: risk identification, impact analysis, remediation roadmap with 5 phases, timelines, and budget allocation.
